The later user ask was to rerun the previously failing automated test, and the assistant reported it was run via the live eval script.

That makes the thread mostly resolved rather than continuing. Earlier turns about adding harder cases and tightening guards are no longer needed as raw prompt evidence for the next turn, but the main implementation outcome is still potentially useful as compact semantic context, so the final substantive change summary is pinned from t8. The intermediate confirmations and status chatter are solved and can leave the next-turn raw working set.
